title: Wednesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: Oil prices declined Tuesday, boosting the Dow above 52,000, but a technology sector selloff pressured the S&P 500. Markets remain sensitive to commodity movements and sector rotation.
content: Oil prices fell Tuesday, giving the Dow Industrials a tailwind and briefly lifting the index above 52,000. A sell-off in tech, however, weighed on the S&P 500.

zh.title: 周三的大股票故事：下一交易时段可能推动市场的因素
zh.summary: 周二油价下跌，推动道琼斯指数突破52,000，但科技板块抛售压低了标普500指数。市场对商品价格波动和板块轮换仍然敏感。

title: Cadbury chocolate-owner Mondelez defends staying in Russia
summary: Mondelez defended its continued operations in Russia despite the Ukraine conflict, with CEO Dirk Van de Put calling it the correct business decision. The stance highlights ongoing corporate presence debates amid geopolitical tensions.
content: Mondelez boss Dirk Van de Put says it was the "right decision" to remain after the war with Ukraine.

zh.title: 吉百利母公司Mondelez为继续在俄罗斯运营进行辩护
zh.summary: 尽管乌克兰冲突，Mondelez为其在俄罗斯的持续运营进行辩护，首席执行官Dirk Van de Put称这是正确的商业决策。这一立场突显了地缘政治紧张中持续的企业存在争议。

title: Cramer's lightning round: Buy Cava
summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer fielded rapid-fire stock questions during his "Mad Money" lightning round segment, recommending Cava among other stocks. The format provides quick investment takes on viewer submissions.
content: "Mad Money" host Jim Cramer rings the lightning round bell, which means he's giving his answers to callers' stock questions at rapid speed.

zh.title: 克莱默的快速问答回合：买入Cava
zh.summary: 美国全国广播公司财经频道的吉姆·克莱默在他的《疯狂金钱》快速问答环节回答了快速的股票问题，推荐了Cava等股票。这种形式为观众提交的问题提供了快速的投资见解。

title: Intel takes a major step toward turning around a business that’s bleeding cash
summary: Intel advanced its manufacturing process to a stage indicating confidence in attracting external customers. The development marks a significant milestone in the chipmaker's turnaround efforts after years of financial losses.
content: Intel’s new manufacturing process has entered a stage that signals the company is confident in its ability to bring on external customers, analysts say.

zh.title: 英特尔朝着扭转亏损业务迈出重大步伐
zh.summary: 英特尔推进了其制造工艺到一个新阶段，显示出吸引外部客户的信心。这一进展标志着这家芯片制造商在多年财务损失后扭转局面的重要里程碑。

title: Jim Cramer says SpaceX investors aren't buying earnings — they're buying Elon Musk
summary: SpaceX investors are primarily betting on Elon Musk's vision and past success rather than current earnings, according to CNBC's Jim Cramer. The analysis highlights how visionary leadership can drive valuations independent of near-term profitability.
content: CNBC's Jim Cramer said SpaceX investors are betting on Elon Musk's vision and track record, rather than the company's current earnings power.

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默说SpaceX投资者不是购买收益——他们在购买埃隆·马斯克
zh.summary: 根据美国全国广播公司财经频道吉姆·克莱默的说法，SpaceX投资者主要是在押注埃隆·马斯克的愿景和过去的成功，而不是当前的收益。这一分析突出了远见卓识的领导如何能够驱动估值，独立于近期的盈利能力。

title: Anthropic's Fable shutdown is a big moment for open-source AI
summary: Anthropic's discontinuation of Fable may accelerate adoption of open-source AI alternatives, though Chinese models are capturing significant market share. The shift reflects intensifying competition in the AI landscape.
content: Anthropic’s Fable shutdown could boost open-source AI, but many of the models gaining traction are Chinese.

zh.title: Anthropic的Fable关闭是开源AI的重要时刻
zh.summary: Anthropic停止Fable的研发可能会加速开源AI替代品的采用，尽管中国模型正在捕获显著的市场份额。这一转变反映了AI领域日益激烈的竞争。

title: Bill limiting investors from buying homes set to speed through Congress
summary: Lawmakers agreed on legislation to restrict investor home purchases, paving the way for congressional passage. The bill aims to address housing affordability by reducing institutional buyer competition.
content: Top lawmakers reached an agreement on a key housing bill that would limit investor ownership, clearing the way for passage through both chambers of Congress.

zh.title: 限制投资者购买住宅的法案预计将在国会快速通过
zh.summary: 议员们同意了限制投资者购房的立法，为国会通过扫清障碍。该法案旨在通过减少机构买家竞争来解决住房可负担性问题。

title: Databricks sales growth tops 80%, but margin are shrinking from swarm of AI agents
summary: Databricks achieved over 80% sales growth driven by AI agents performing data analysis, but rising operational costs are compressing profit margins. The growth illustrates the infrastructure demands of AI-powered enterprise tools.
content: Databricks is seeing higher growth as AI agents assist with data analysis, but all that activity is significantly increasing costs.

zh.title: Databricks销售增长超过80%，但AI代理大军导致利润率下降
zh.summary: Databricks实现了超过80%的销售增长，由执行数据分析的AI代理驱动，但运营成本上升正在压缩利润率。这种增长说明了AI驱动企业工具的基础设施需求。

title: How Roku fits into Fox's future — and what investors are missing about the deal
summary: Fox announced a $22 billion acquisition of Roku, causing the stock to dip despite analyst support for the strategic value. The deal signals consolidation in streaming and digital advertising markets.
content: Fox's stock dropped following its announcement that it will acquire Roku for $22 billion. Analysts still think it's a good deal.

zh.title: Roku如何融入Fox的未来——投资者遗漏的交易价值
zh.summary: Fox宣布以220亿美元收购Roku,尽管分析师支持其战略价值,但股价下跌。该交易预示着流媒体和数字广告市场的整合。

title: Wall Street can’t stop talking about ‘MANGOS’ stocks as the ‘Magnificent Seven’ becomes passé
summary: Wall Street has introduced "MANGOS" stocks as the successor to the "Magnificent Seven," reflecting evolving investment trends in artificial intelligence. The new grouping expands the AI investment narrative beyond the original mega-cap seven.
content: Wall Street has a new way to sell the artificial-intelligence trade: take the companies investors most want to own, including some they still cannot buy, and turn them into an acronym.

zh.title: 当"七巨头"逐渐过时时,华尔街对"MANGOS"股票议论纷纷
zh.summary: 华尔街推出"MANGOS"股票作为"七巨头"的继承者,反映了人工智能投资趋势的演变。新分组扩展了AI投资叙述,超越了原始七家大市值公司。

title: Tesla booted from the ‘Magnificent Seven’ by a top fund manager. Here is the tech giant he’s crowned.
summary: T. Rowe Price's David Giroux removed Tesla from his "Magnificent Seven" portfolio while identifying healthcare and utilities as undervalued alternatives. The shift suggests analyst skepticism about pure-play tech valuations despite broader market strength.
content: T. Rowe Price fund manager David Giroux says Big Tech isn’t in a bubble, but there’s value in healthcare and utilities.

zh.title: T. Rowe Price基金经理将特斯拉从"七巨头"中除名,并选中另一家科技巨头
zh.summary: T. Rowe Price的David Giroux从其"七巨头"投资组合中移除特斯拉,同时确定医疗保健和公用事业为被低估的替代品。这一转变表明分析师对纯科技股估值持怀疑态度,尽管整体市场表现强劲。

title: SpaceX trading hits ‘bonkers’ levels as a wave of new ETFs see a massive cash influx
summary: New leveraged ETFs tracking SpaceX are attracting significant investor interest as retail investors seek exposure to the company's hype. This reflects growing appetite for specialized financial instruments tied to high-growth companies.
content: Newly launched leveraged ETFs are seeing heavy inflows as investors look for fresh ways to play the SpaceX hype.

zh.title: SpaceX交易达到"疯狂"水平，新ETF吸引大量资金涌入
zh.summary: 追踪SpaceX的新型杠杆ETF正吸引投资者的广泛关注，零售投资者争相寻求对该公司相关热点的敞口。这反映了市场对与高增长公司挂钩的专业金融工具日益增长的需求。

title: Fed Chair Warsh expected to withhold 'dot' from central bank's interest rate outlook
summary: Federal Reserve Chair Warsh is expected to omit the traditional 'dot' plot from the quarterly interest rate guidance, signaling a shift in monetary policy communication. This decision reflects uncertainty about future interest rate direction.
content: The central bank's Federal Open Market Committee is set to release its quarterly update of where individual officials expect interest rates to head.

zh.title: 美联储主席沃什预期将从中央银行利率前景中撤回"点阵"
zh.summary: 美联储主席沃什预计将从季度利率指导中省略传统的"点阵图"，标志着货币政策沟通方式的转变。这一决定反映了对未来利率方向的不确定性。

title: Trump signals he could send details of Iran deal to Congress
summary: President Trump is considering sharing details of a recently announced Iran peace deal framework with Congress, though the agreement has received mixed reactions from lawmakers. The move signals ongoing debate over the deal's merits and implementation.
content: The peace deal announced Sunday is meeting lukewarm reactions from Congress, including some allies of President Donald Trump.

zh.title: 特朗普表示他可能将伊朗协议细节送交国会
zh.summary: 特朗普总统正在考虑与国会分享最近宣布的伊朗和平协议框架的细节，尽管该协议在立法者中反应不一。这一举动标志着对该协议优劣和实施的持续争议。

title: July Fourth is around the corner. Here's how your credit card can help you save on last-minute travel
summary: Credit cards can offer substantial savings on last-minute July Fourth travel bookings through specialized travel benefits beyond standard rewards. Cardholders can leverage these benefits to reduce holiday trip costs.
content: When it comes to saving on last-minute bookings for July Fourth, your credit card may offer far more than just rewards.

zh.title: 七月四日即将到来。以下是您的信用卡如何帮助您节省最后一刻旅行费用
zh.summary: 信用卡可以通过超越标准奖励的专业旅行优惠，在最后一刻的七月四日旅行预订上提供巨大节省。持卡人可以利用这些优惠来降低假期旅行成本。

title: The new oil? Inside the effort to turn AI computing power into a tradeable commodity
summary: AI computing power is being developed as a tradeable commodity through futures contracts, potentially creating a market rivaling major commodity exchanges. This development could reshape how companies access and price artificial intelligence infrastructure.
content: AI compute futures could eventually rival some of the world's largest commodity markets, Silicon Data's Carmen Li believes.

zh.title: 新的石油？揭秘将人工智能计算能力转变为可交易商品的努力
zh.summary: 人工智能计算能力正在通过期货合约被开发为可交易商品，可能创建与主要商品交易所相竞争的市场。这一发展可能改变公司如何获取和定价人工智能基础设施。

title: SpaceX gets assist from DOJ in effort to toss NAACP air pollution lawsuit
summary: The Department of Justice is supporting SpaceX's effort to dismiss a lawsuit filed by the NAACP regarding air pollution from xAI operations. The legal move highlights tensions between government support for major corporations and civil rights concerns.
content: The DOJ is asking a Mississippi federal court to dismiss a lawsuit filed by the NAACP against Elon Musk's xAI, now owned by SpaceX.

zh.title: 司法部助力SpaceX驳回NAACP空气污染诉讼
zh.summary: 司法部正在支持SpaceX驳回由全国有色人种促进协会提起的关于xAI运营造成空气污染的诉讼。这一法律举措突显了政府对大公司的支持与民权关切之间的紧张关系。

title: An old economy sector may break out thanks to hyperscaler investment. Todd Gordon outlines how to play it
summary: Traditional 'old economy' sectors are experiencing renewed growth as major tech companies invest heavily in their infrastructure and operations. This creates investment opportunities in overlooked industries benefiting from the broader AI expansion.
content: Another group has participated in the growth trade breakout and recently showed outperformance, creating a quieter AI revolution in this "old economy" sector.

zh.title: 传统产业可能因超大规模数据中心投资而突破。托德·戈登阐述如何参与其中
zh.summary: 随着主要科技公司大力投资基础设施和运营，传统'旧经济'行业正经历增长复兴。这为受益于更广泛人工智能扩张的被忽视的行业创造了投资机会。

title: What have the U.S. and Iran agreed to? This is what markets are focused on.
summary: The Trump administration and Iran have reached a framework for a peace deal, with markets closely monitoring the potential economic implications. Key details remain unclear as the administration prepares to release the full agreement text.
content: The Trump administration and Iran have agreed on a framework for a peace deal. As everyone waits for the text of the framework to get released, here is a rundown of what the key points are for markets.

zh.title: 美国和伊朗达成了什么协议？这是市场关注的焦点
zh.summary: 特朗普政府和伊朗已达成和平协议框架，市场密切关注潜在的经济影响。随着政府准备公布完整协议文本，关键细节仍不清楚。

title: Jim Cramer: Why we're headed back to pre-Iran war oil prices and what it means
summary: Analyst Jim Cramer argues that sustained declining oil prices following the Iran deal framework could have broad positive effects across the economy. Lower oil prices would reduce costs for consumers and businesses, supporting economic growth.
content: A sustained decline in oil prices would reverberate positively through the economy.

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默：我们为什么会回到伊朗战争前的油价及其含义
zh.summary: 分析师吉姆·克莱默认为，伊朗协议框架后油价持续下跌可能对整个经济产生广泛的积极影响。油价下降将降低消费者和企业的成本，支持经济增长。

title: Struggling Pizza Hut chain to be sold for $2.7bn
summary: Pizza Hut is being sold for $2.7 billion after facing prolonged operational challenges and intense competition from various rivals. The sale marks a significant transition for the struggling restaurant chain.
content: The decision comes after a prolonged period of difficulty for the chain, which has faced increasing competition from a range of rivals.

zh.title: 经营困难的必胜客连锁将以27亿美元出售
zh.summary: 必胜客因长期运营困难和来自各种竞争对手的激烈竞争，正以27亿美元出售。此次出售标志着这家经营困难的连锁餐厅的重大转折。

title: Snap unveils $2,195 AR glasses as CEO Evan Spiegel bets on post-smartphone future
summary: Snap has launched consumer-focused augmented reality glasses priced at $2,195, marking the company's bet on AR as the next computing platform beyond smartphones. The move positions Snap as a competitor in the emerging AR hardware market.
content: Snap is launching its first AR glasses geared toward the broader public instead of developers.

zh.title: Snap推出2195美元AR眼镜，CEO埃文·施皮格尔押注后智能手机时代
zh.summary: Snap推出了售价2195美元的面向消费者的增强现实眼镜，标志着公司将AR视为智能手机之外的下一个计算平台。此举将Snap定位为新兴AR硬件市场的竞争者。

title: FBI says it disrupted alleged plot targeting UFC event at White House
summary: The FBI has detained multiple individuals after disrupting an alleged plot targeting a UFC event scheduled at the White House, according to FBI Director Kash Patel. Details about the specific threat remain limited pending investigation.
content: FBI Director Kash Patel said multiple people are in custody after law enforcement disrupted an alleged plot targeting Sunday’s UFC event at the White House.

zh.title: FBI表示破获针对白宫UFC赛事的涉嫌恐怖计划
zh.summary: 据FBI局长卡什·帕特尔称，FBI在破获针对定于白宫举行的UFC赛事的涉嫌阴谋后拘留了多人。关于具体威胁的细节仍有限，有待进一步调查。

title: Odds that a proposed billionaire tax appears on California ballots plunge on prediction markets
summary: Prediction market odds for a proposed California billionaire tax initiative have dropped significantly after reports that Governor Gavin Newsom is working to block the proposal. The development suggests reduced likelihood of the measure appearing on the ballot.
content: Odds that a proposed billionaire tax is on California's ballot dropped after reports noted that Gov. Gavin Newsom is pushing to stop the proposal.

zh.title: 加州提议的亿万富翁税出现在选票上的可能性在预测市场中暴跌
zh.summary: 关于加州提议的亿万富翁税提案在预测市场中的赔率大幅下降，原因是有报道称州长加文·纽松正在努力阻止该提案。这一发展表明该措施出现在选票上的可能性降低。

title: Chicken tenders are taking over the world, and KFC is rushing to keep up
summary: Chicken tenders and sandwiches are becoming the dominant product category in fast-food chicken chains, with KFC adapting its menu strategy to keep pace. The shift reflects changing dining habits favoring convenient, portable options.
content: Goodbye bone-in wings, hello tenders and chicken sandwiches that can be easily eaten in the car.

zh.title: 鸡肉条正在统治世界，肯德基急于跟上步伐
zh.summary: 鸡肉条和三明治正在成为快餐鸡肉连锁店的主导产品类别，肯德基正在调整其菜单策略以保持竞争力。这一转变反映了消费者饮食习惯的变化，更倾向于方便、便携的选项。

title: Iran deal won't solve oil supply issues overnight. Barclays keeps $100 forecast
summary: Barclays warns that despite the Iran peace deal framework, normalizing physical oil supply chains through the Strait of Hormuz could take several weeks. The bank maintains its $100 oil price forecast, suggesting limited near-term price relief.
content: Barclays warns that immediate normalization of physical oil supply chains across the Strait of Hormuz could take weeks.

zh.title: 伊朗协议不会立即解决石油供应问题。巴克莱维持100美元预测
zh.summary: 巴克莱警告称，尽管伊朗和平协议框架已经确立，但通过霍尔木兹海峡实现石油供应链正常化可能需要数周时间。该银行维持其100美元油价预测，表明近期油价缓解空间有限。

title: Yum Brands sells Pizza Hut to private equity firm LongRange Capital and Yum China for $2.7 billion
summary: Yum Brands is divesting Pizza Hut to private equity firm LongRange Capital and Yum China in a $2.7 billion deal, ending a turbulent period for the pizza chain. The sale represents a major portfolio restructuring as Yum seeks to refocus its business strategy.
content: Yum Brands is selling Pizza Hut, capping off years of struggles for the pizza chain.

zh.title: 百胜集团以27亿美元将必胜客出售给私募基金LongRange Capital和百胜中国
zh.summary: 百胜集团以27亿美元的价格将必胜客出售给私募基金LongRange Capital和百胜中国，结束了这家披萨连锁店的动荡期。此次出售代表了百胜集团进行重大投资组合重组，以重新聚焦其业务战略。

title: SpaceX passes Amazon by market cap in third day of trading as stock pops 8%
summary: SpaceX has surpassed Amazon in market capitalization on its third day of trading, with the stock gaining 8% on strong investor demand. CEO Elon Musk projects the company could reach approximately $1 trillion in annual revenue by 2030.
content: CEO Elon Musk said Sunday that the company "might be able to reach approximately" $1 trillion revenue in 2030."

zh.title: SpaceX在上市第三天超越亚马逊市值，股票上涨8%
zh.summary: SpaceX在上市第三天的市值已超过亚马逊，股票在投资者强劲需求下上涨8%。首席执行官埃隆·马斯克预计该公司到2030年年收入可能达到约1万亿美元。

title: As baby boomers turn 80, caregiving is the unexpected job more Americans face
summary: Approximately 23 million Americans serve as caregivers for aging adults as baby boomers reach their 80s, with many reporting the role is physically, mentally, and financially draining. The unpaid caregiving sector has become an unexpected burden affecting millions of families.
content: “It’s 24/7 and it never goes away”: Some 23 million people care for an older adult — and it’s depleting them physically, mentally and financially.

zh.title: 随着婴儿潮一代进入80岁，护理成为越来越多美国人面临的意外工作
zh.summary: 随着婴儿潮一代步入80岁，大约2300万美国人担任老年人的护理者，许多人表示这个角色在身体上、精神上和经济上都令人筋疲力尽。无薪护理部门已成为影响数百万家庭的意外负担。

title: The AI ‘bottleneck trade’ has run its course, says this hedge-fund manager and early SpaceX investor
summary: Altreides Management managing partner Gavin Baker notes that the "bottleneck trade" in AI—a popular investment strategy—is losing momentum and beginning to wind down. The hedge fund manager's assessment suggests this AI trading cycle may be concluding.
content: One hot AI trade that is starting to wind down is the “bottleneck trade,” says Altreides Management managing partner Gavin Baker

zh.title: AI"瓶颈交易"已告一段落，对冲基金经理和SpaceX早期投资者表示
zh.summary: Altreides Management管理合伙人Gavin Baker表示，作为热门投资策略的AI"瓶颈交易"正在失去动力并逐渐停止。这位对冲基金经理的评估表明这一AI交易周期可能即将结束。

title: This will be the summer of the 'everything rally,' says Wells Fargo
summary: Wells Fargo predicts the coming summer will see broad market gains extending beyond technology and AI stocks into a wider array of sectors. The forecast indicates investors should expect an "everything rally" with opportunities across diverse equities.
content: It won't just be tech and artificial intelligence stocks driving gains over the next several months, according to Wells Fargo.

zh.title: 今年夏天将是"全面反弹"的季节，富国银行表示
zh.summary: 富国银行预测，即将到来的夏季将看到市场广泛上涨，范围超越科技和AI股票，扩展到更广泛的行业。该预测表明投资者应该期待"全面反弹"，在各类股票中都能找到机遇。

title: Treasury yields are little changed ahead of Kevin Warsh's first Fed meeting
summary: U.S. Treasury yields remained stable on Tuesday as markets await the Federal Reserve's two-day policy meeting under new leadership. Kevin Warsh's first Fed meeting comes as investors assess potential policy direction on interest rates.
content: U.S. Treasury yields were little changed on Tuesday as investors look ahead to the Federal Reserve's two-day policy meeting.

zh.title: Kevin Warsh首次出席美联储会议前，国债收益率基本没有变化
zh.summary: 当市场等待美联储在新领导下进行为期两天的政策会议时，美国国债收益率周二保持稳定。在投资者评估利率政策潜在走向之际，Kevin Warsh迎来了他的首次美联储会议。

title: This is as good as it gets for gas prices, new Goldman Sachs oil analysis suggests
summary: Goldman Sachs analysis suggests current gas prices represent peak levels, with downside risks if a peace deal with Iran is finalized. The report notes the global economy has demonstrated flexibility in absorbing major oil production disruptions.
content: Risks to oil price assumptions in the event of a finalized peace deal are two-sided but the Goldman Sachs report notes that the global economy adjusted very flexibly to the largest oil production shock in history

zh.title: 这就是汽油价格最好的时刻，新的高盛石油分析表明
zh.summary: 高盛分析表明当前汽油价格代表最高水平，如果与伊朗达成和平协议存在下跌风险。该报告指出全球经济在吸收主要石油生产中断方面表现出灵活性。

title: SpaceX’s massive valuation may soon become its own worst enemy
summary: SpaceX's exceptionally high valuation may create challenges as the company grows, following the historical pattern where massive firms struggle to maintain stock momentum. The company's enormous size could become a limiting factor on future stock appreciation.
content: The biggest companies struggle to keep up with the stock market due to size alone.

zh.title: SpaceX巨大的估值可能很快成为自己最大的敌人
zh.summary: SpaceX异常高的估值在公司成长过程中可能会带来挑战，遵循大型公司难以保持股票动力的历史模式。该公司的巨大规模可能成为未来股票升值的限制因素。

title: Carvana is expanding into new vehicles. The implications could reshape the U.S. automotive retail market
summary: Carvana has acquired seven new vehicle franchises selling Stellantis brands including Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep, and Ram, expanding beyond used-car sales into traditional automotive retail. This move signals potential industry disruption in the competitive U.S. auto sales market.
content: Carvana has bought seven new vehicle franchises since last year that primarily sell Stellantis' Chrysler, Dodge, Jeep and Ram brands.

zh.title: Carvana正在扩展新车业务，其影响可能重塑美国汽车零售市场
zh.summary: Carvana已获得七个销售斯泰兰蒂斯品牌（包括克莱斯勒、道奇、吉普和公羊）的新车特许经营权，从二手车销售扩展到传统汽车零售。这一举措表明美国竞争激烈的汽车销售市场可能面临行业颠覆。

title: Trump denies U.S. will put 'any money' into Iran, as he meets allies at G7 summit
summary: President Trump denied the U.S. will provide financial support to Iran while meeting allies at the G7 summit in France. The statement follows a memorandum of understanding reached between Washington and Tehran over the weekend.
content: Washington and Tehran announced a memorandum of understanding had been reached over the weekend.

zh.title: 特朗普否认美国将向伊朗投入"任何资金"，同时在G7峰会上会见盟国
zh.summary: 特朗普总统在法国G7峰会上与盟国会晤期间，否认美国将向伊朗提供财政支持。这一声明是在华盛顿和德黑兰周末达成谅解备忘录后发表的。

title: How AI may be messing with home prices
summary: AI technology is reshaping real estate markets by enabling enhanced data aggregation for professionals, though it has notable limitations affecting pricing accuracy. The tools can amplify expertise but also create challenges in valuation and market assessment.
content: For most real estate professionals, the data aggregation capabilities of AI can enhance their expertise. But there are shortcomings.

zh.title: 人工智能如何可能影响房价
zh.summary: 人工智能技术通过为专业人士提供增强的数据聚合功能来重塑房地产市场，尽管它在影响定价准确性方面存在明显局限。这些工具可以扩大专业知识的优势，但也在估值和市场评估中造成挑战。

title: Brent oil dips below $80 per barrel for first time since March
summary: Brent crude oil fell below $80 per barrel for the first time since March, reaching a three-month low driven by the Iran peace agreement announced at the G7 meeting. The geopolitical breakthrough eased energy market tensions.
content: Global oil prices tumbled to a three-month low on Tuesday as the Iran peace agreement dominated the G7 meeting in France.

zh.title: 布伦特油价三个月来首次跌至每桶80美元以下
zh.summary: 布伦特原油首次跌至每桶80美元以下，创下三个月新低，这是由G7会议上公布的伊朗和平协议推动的。这一地缘政治突破缓解了能源市场紧张局势。

title: Americans’ 401(k) balances hit record levels last year. See how you compare.
summary: Americans' 401(k) retirement savings reached record levels last year, according to Vanguard's latest "How America Saves" report, reflecting strong investment performance. Most workplace retirement savers benefited significantly from favorable market conditions.
content: It was a very good year for most workplace retirement savers, according to Vanguard’s latest “How America Saves” report

zh.title: 美国人的401(k)余额去年创历史新高，看看你的表现如何
zh.summary: 根据先锋基金集团最新的"美国人如何储蓄"报告，美国人的401(k)退休储蓄去年达到历史新高，反映了强劲的投资表现。大多数职场退休储蓄者从有利的市场环境中受益良多。

title: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Tuesday
summary: Jim Cramer highlighted SpaceX and nine other market topics as key issues to watch for stock market investors on Tuesday. The analysis focuses on significant market movements and investment opportunities for the trading session.
content: SpaceX is back at it again.

zh.title: 吉姆·克莱默周二需关注的股市10大事项
zh.summary: 吉姆·克莱默强调了SpaceX和其他九个市场热点，作为股票投资者周二需要关注的关键问题。分析侧重于重大市场动向和交易机会。

title: Kevin Warsh's Fed is not expected to make any change to rates for a while, according to CNBC Fed Survey
summary: Federal Reserve respondents surveyed by CNBC do not expect rate changes at Kevin Warsh's first policy meeting, though the Fed is expected to remove its easing bias from official statements. The survey indicates a pause in monetary policy adjustments.
content: The survey respondents do expect the Fed at this week's meeting to remove the easing bias in the statement that has signaled the Fed's next move would likely be a cut.

zh.title: 根据CNBC美联储调查，凯文·沃什领导的美联储短期内不会改变利率
zh.summary: 根据CNBC调查，美联储受访者不预计凯文·沃什首次政策会议会改变利率，不过美联储预计会从官方声明中取消宽松偏见。调查表明货币政策调整会进入暂停期。

title: Qualcomm CEO says AI agents will replace apps — as chip giant works on 40 new AI-powered devices
summary: Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon predicts AI agents will eventually replace traditional apps while the company develops 40 new AI-powered devices. He believes smart glasses could eventually rival smartphones as a dominant platform, positioning Qualcomm to capitalize on this industry shift.
content: Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon said he is bullish on smart glasses which could eventually become as big as the smartphone.

zh.title: 高通CEO表示AI代理将取代应用程序——芯片巨头开发40款新AI设备
zh.summary: 高通首席执行官克里斯蒂亚诺·阿蒙预测AI代理最终将取代传统应用程序，同时该公司正在开发40款新型AI设备。他认为智能眼镜最终可能与智能手机相抗衡，成为主导平台，这将使高通能够利用这一行业转变。

title: Australia central bank warns hikes are not off the table as it keeps rates steady at 4.35%
summary: The Reserve Bank of Australia held interest rates steady at 4.35% while signaling future rate hikes remain possible if inflation doesn't decline further. The central bank emphasized that persistent inflation still exceeds its target, keeping the door open for additional monetary tightening.
content: In its statement, the RBA said that inflation was "still too high," which warranted to keep the cash rate unchanged

zh.title: 澳大利亚央行警告加息仍有可能，同时将利率维持在4.35%
zh.summary: 澳大利亚储备银行将利率维持在4.35%的水平，同时表示如果通胀进一步下降，未来加息仍有可能。央行强调持续性通胀仍然超过目标，为进一步的货币紧缩敞开了大门。

title: Bank of Japan hikes rates to 1%, highest since 1995, as yen and inflation worries take hold
summary: The Bank of Japan raised its policy rate to 1%, the highest level since 1995, marking its first rate increase since December as it tackles inflation and currency pressures. This move reflects the BOJ's commitment to normalize monetary policy after years of near-zero rates.
content: This is the BOJ's first hike since December, when it raised rates to its current level of 0.75%, also its highest level in over 30 years.

zh.title: 日本央行将利率上调至1%，为1995年以来最高，因日元和通胀担忧升温
zh.summary: 日本央行将政策利率上调至1%，这是1995年以来的最高水平，标志着自12月以来的首次加息，以应对通胀和汇率压力。这一举措反映了日本央行在多年接近零利率后实现货币政策正常化的承诺。

title: Japan raises interest rate to highest since 1995
summary: The Bank of Japan has raised its interest rates to the highest level since 1995 as part of a gradual tightening cycle that began in 2024. This represents a significant shift in Japan's ultra-loose monetary policy stance.
content: The Bank of Japan has been raising rates from near-zero since 2024.

zh.title: 日本将利率上调至1995年以来最高水平
zh.summary: 日本央行已将利率上调至1995年以来最高水平，这是自2024年开始的逐步收紧周期的一部分。这代表了日本超宽松货币政策立场的重大转变。

title: Biotech IPO window is opening but big pharma M&A still sets the pace, top bankers tell CNBC
summary: While biotech companies have better IPO prospects, major pharmaceutical mergers and acquisitions remain the dominant trend in biopharma dealmaking. Drug makers are consolidating to bolster pipelines before key patents expire later in the decade.
content: Biopharma dealmaking is driven by pressure to top up drug pipelines ahead of major patent expirations later this decade.

zh.title: 生物技术IPO窗口打开，但大制药并购仍主导局面
zh.summary: 虽然生物技术公司的IPO前景更好，但大型制药业的并购仍然是生物制药交易的主导趋势。制药公司正在进行整合，以在关键专利在十年后失效前加强产品管道。

title: Gold sell-off was a 'reset,' says Barclays — and these mining stocks could benefit from a rebound
summary: Barclays characterizes recent gold price declines as a "reset" rather than a fundamental shift, suggesting precious metals could rebound as geopolitical risks persist and interest rate expectations stabilize. Mining stocks may particularly benefit from a gold price recovery.
content: Gold's safe haven status was called into question during the war as the specter of higher interest rates weighed on the non-yielding asset.

zh.title: 黄金抛售是一次"调整"，巴克莱表示，这些矿业股可能从反弹中受益
zh.summary: 巴克莱将最近的黄金价格下跌描述为"调整"而非基本面转变，表明随着地缘政治风险持续和利率预期稳定，贵金属可能反弹。矿业股可能特别受益于黄金价格的恢复。

title: Fed's 2026 rate path is underpriced by markets if this PGIM call is right
summary: PGIM analysts believe markets are underestimating the Federal Reserve's 2026 interest rate trajectory, suggesting the Fed may keep rates higher for longer than current pricing reflects. This discrepancy between market expectations and Fed policy could create significant trading implications.

zh.title: 美联储2026年利率路径被市场低估——如果PGIM的判断正确的话
zh.summary: PGIM分析师认为市场低估了美联储2026年的利率轨迹，表明美联储可能会比当前市场定价所反映的时间更长地维持高利率。市场预期与美联储政策之间的这种差异可能会产生重大交易影响。

title: China economy weakens further in May as retail sales post first drop in over three years
summary: China's economy deteriorated in May with retail sales declining for the first time in over three years and urban investment contracting more than expected. These weak data points signal a deepening economic slowdown in the world's second-largest economy.
content: China's retail sales fell for the first time in more than three years in May, while urban investment contracted more than expected, adding to signs the economic slump deepened.

zh.title: 中国5月经济进一步走弱，零售销售创三年多来首次下滑
zh.summary: 中国5月份经济形势恶化，零售销售创三年多来首次下降，城市投资收缩幅度超出预期。这些疲弱的数据表明全球第二大经济体的经济放缓正在加深。

title: South Korean defense stocks surge on prospects for post-Iran-war sales boosts
summary: South Korean defense stocks are surging on expectations that the Iran conflict will create new sales opportunities in the Middle East. The sector sees potential for expanding export pipelines to regional buyers seeking military equipment.
content: South Korean defense stocks have risen as there will be "numerous export pipelines" for companies to sell to the Middle East.

zh.title: 韩国防务股因伊朗战争后销售机会前景而飙升
zh.summary: 韩国防务股因伊朗冲突预期会在中东创造新销售机会而飙升。该行业看好向寻求军事装备的地区买家扩展出口管道的前景。

title: The biggest risk to your retirement isn’t a market crash — it’s a crisis you probably haven’t planned for
summary: Health-related financial risks pose the greatest threat to retirement security, often outweighing market volatility concerns. Adequate planning for medical and long-term care expenses is critical for maintaining financial stability in retirement.
content: Health-related financial risks are the No. 1 threat to retirement security.

zh.title: 退休最大的风险不是市场崩盘——而是你可能还没有做好准备的危机
zh.summary: 与健康相关的财务风险对退休保障构成最大威胁，往往超过市场波动的关注。充分规划医疗和长期护理费用对于维持退休财务稳定至关重要。

title: What is Helium-3 and could we get it from the moon?
summary: Helium-3, an expensive and increasingly rare isotope, is in high demand for various applications. Companies and governments are exploring lunar mining as a potential source to meet projected demand surges.
content: Helium-3 is expensive and demand is forecast to soar, so some are planning to mine it on the moon.

zh.title: 什么是氦-3，我们能从月球获得它吗？
zh.summary: 氦-3是一种昂贵且日益稀有的同位素，在各种应用中需求量很大。各公司和政府正在探索月球采矿作为潜在来源，以满足预计的需求增长。

title: Thames Water moves step closer to nationalisation after government objects to rescue deal
summary: Thames Water, the UK's major water utility, faces potential nationalization after the government rejected a private rescue plan as inadequate for consumer and environmental protection. The rejection signals the government may take direct control to address service and environmental concerns.
content: A government spokesman tells the BBC that the current offer "does not do enough to protect consumers or the environment".

zh.title: 英国政府反对救援方案后，泰晤士水务公司更接近国有化
zh.summary: 英国主要水务公司泰晤士水务在政府拒绝私人救援计划（认为其不足以保护消费者和环保）后，面临潜在的国有化。这一拒绝表明政府可能会直接控制该公司以解决服务和环保问题。
